has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: int_accounts_enriched
metadata.comment: Intermediate layer enriching accounts with parent account and owner context. Grain: 1 row per account.

owner_id.name: owner_id
owner_id.comment: Foreign key to User. Account owner.

parent_account_id.name: parent_account_id
parent_account_id.comment: Foreign key to Account (self-referencing). Parent account if this is a subsidiary (optional).

is_deleted.name: is_deleted
is_deleted.comment: Whether account is marked as deleted.

owner_full_name.name: owner_full_name
owner_full_name.comment: Denormalized. Full name of account owner.

owner_is_active.name: owner_is_active
owner_is_active.comment: Denormalized. Whether account owner is active.

is_subsidiary.name: is_subsidiary
is_subsidiary.comment: Derived. Whether this account has a parent (Boolean).

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: int_leads_converted
metadata.comment: Intermediate layer with converted lead details (many-to-one mapping: converted leads -> account/contact/opportunity). Grain: 1 row per converted lead.

owner_id.name: owner_id
owner_id.comment: Foreign key to User. Lead owner at time of conversion.

converted_account_id.name: converted_account_id
converted_account_id.comment: Foreign key to Account. Account created from this lead conversion (nullable).

converted_contact_id.name: converted_contact_id
converted_contact_id.comment: Foreign key to Contact. Contact created from this lead conversion (nullable).

converted_opportunity_id.name: converted_opportunity_id
converted_opportunity_id.comment: Foreign key to Opportunity. Opportunity created from this lead conversion (nullable).

lead_source.name: lead_source
lead_source.comment: Lead source (Web, Event, Referral, Employee Referral).

is_converted.name: is_converted
is_converted.comment: Derived. Always TRUE for this table (only converted leads).

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: int_opportunities_enriched
metadata.comment: Intermediate layer enriching opportunities with account, user, and campaign context. Grain: 1 row per opportunity (matches stg_opportunities grain).

account_id.name: account_id
account_id.comment: Foreign key to Account. Account this opportunity belongs to.

owner_id.name: owner_id
owner_id.comment: Foreign key to User. Sales rep who owns this opportunity.

campaign_id.name: campaign_id
campaign_id.comment: Foreign key to Campaign. Campaign this opportunity is associated with (optional).

contact_id.name: contact_id
contact_id.comment: Foreign key to Contact. Primary contact for this opportunity (optional).

account_annual_revenue.name: account_annual_revenue
account_annual_revenue.comment: Denormalized. Annual revenue of the account.

account_employees.name: account_employees
account_employees.comment: Denormalized. Number of employees at the account.

account_country.name: account_country
account_country.comment: Denormalized. Billing country of the account.

owner_first_name.name: owner_first_name
owner_first_name.comment: Denormalized. First name of the opportunity owner.

owner_last_name.name: owner_last_name
owner_last_name.comment: Denormalized. Last name of the opportunity owner.

owner_email.name: owner_email
owner_email.comment: Denormalized. Email of the opportunity owner.

owner_department.name: owner_department
owner_department.comment: Denormalized. Department of the opportunity owner.

owner_title.name: owner_title
owner_title.comment: Denormalized. Job title of the opportunity owner.

owner_is_active.name: owner_is_active
owner_is_active.comment: Denormalized. Whether the opportunity owner is an active user.

owner_role_id.name: owner_role_id
owner_role_id.comment: Foreign key to User Role. Role hierarchy of opportunity owner.

owner_manager_id.name: owner_manager_id
owner_manager_id.comment: Denormalized. Manager of the opportunity owner (optional).

campaign_type.name: campaign_type
campaign_type.comment: Denormalized. Type of campaign (Advertisement, Conference, Trade Show, Web) (optional).

campaign_status.name: campaign_status
campaign_status.comment: Denormalized. Status of the campaign (Planned, In Progress, Completed, Aborted) (optional).

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: dim_accounts
metadata.comment: Account dimension. Grain: 1 row per account. Contains account attributes, classification, and denormalized owner information.

account_key.name: account_key
account_key.comment: Surrogate key for account (stable across runs via generate_surrogate_key).

account_id.name: account_id
account_id.comment: Natural key. Unique identifier for the account from Salesforce.

owner_id.name: owner_id
owner_id.comment: Foreign key to dim_users. Account owner.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: dim_campaigns
metadata.comment: Campaign dimension. Grain: 1 row per campaign. Marketing campaign details and metadata.

campaign_type.name: campaign_type
campaign_type.comment: Type of campaign (Email, Trade Show, Conference, Co-Marketing).

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: dim_contacts
metadata.comment: Contact dimension. Grain: 1 row per contact. Individual contact records linked to accounts.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: dim_date
metadata.comment: Date dimension. Grain: 1 row per date. Built from dbt_date package for time-based analysis.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: dim_products
metadata.comment: Product dimension. Grain: 1 row per product. Product details and classifications.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: dim_users
metadata.comment: User dimension. Grain: 1 row per Salesforce user. Sales team and support staff profiles.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: fct_cases
metadata.comment: Support case fact table. Grain: 1 row per case. Support operations metrics including resolution time and escalation tracking.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: fct_leads
metadata.comment: Lead fact table. Grain: 1 row per lead. Lead conversion metrics and outcomes.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: fct_opportunities
metadata.comment: Opportunity fact table. Grain: 1 row per opportunity. Incremental materialization with date-based refresh logic. Core sales pipeline metrics.

campaign_id.name: campaign_id
campaign_id.comment: Foreign key to dim_campaigns (nullable for non-campaign opps).

days_to_close.name: days_to_close
days_to_close.comment: Derived. Days from creation to close date (or null if not closed).

last_modified_date.name: last_modified_date
last_modified_date.comment: Last modified date (used for incremental refresh).

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: fct_opportunities_summary
metadata.comment: Opportunity summary fact table. Grain: 1 row per opportunity. Uses Jinja loop for dynamic column selection. Aggregated metrics for executive reporting.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: fct_opportunity_line_items
metadata.comment: Bridge table (Many-to-Many). Grain: 1 row per (opportunity_id, pricebook_entry_id) combination. Connects opportunities to products through pricebook entries. NOTE: Simulated from Opportunity.pricebook2id join—production should source OpportunityLineItem object directly.

line_item_key.name: line_item_key
line_item_key.comment: Surrogate key for the bridge table (composite of opportunity_id + pricebook_entry_id).

opportunity_id.name: opportunity_id
opportunity_id.comment: Natural key part 1. Foreign key to fct_opportunities.

product_id.name: product_id
product_id.comment: Natural key part 2. Foreign key to dim_products.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_salesforce__account
metadata.comment: Staging layer for Salesforce Account records (companies). Grain: 1 row per account.

account_id.name: account_id
account_id.comment: Primary key. Unique identifier for the account from Salesforce.

parentid.name: parentid
parentid.comment: Foreign key to Account. Parent account if this is a subsidiary (optional).

annualrevenue.name: annualrevenue
annualrevenue.comment: Annual revenue of the account in USD.

numberofemployees.name: numberofemployees
numberofemployees.comment: Number of employees at the company.

ownerid.name: ownerid
ownerid.comment: Foreign key to User. Account owner/manager.

createddate.name: createddate
createddate.comment: Timestamp when account was created in Salesforce.

sla__c.name: sla__c
sla__c.comment: Custom field. SLA tier for the account.

active__c.name: active__c
active__c.comment: Custom field. Whether account is active (Boolean).

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_salesforce__campaign
metadata.comment: Staging layer for Salesforce Campaign records (marketing campaigns). Grain: 1 row per campaign.

campaign_id.name: campaign_id
campaign_id.comment: Primary key. Unique identifier for the campaign from Salesforce.

type.name: type
type.comment: Campaign type (e.g., Advertisement, Conference, Trade Show, Web).

status.name: status
status.comment: Campaign status (Planned, In Progress, Completed, Aborted).

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_salesforce__case
metadata.comment: Staging layer for Salesforce Case records (support tickets). Grain: 1 row per case.

case_id.name: case_id
case_id.comment: Primary key. Unique identifier for the case from Salesforce.

casenumber.name: casenumber
casenumber.comment: Human-readable case number for support reference.

contactid.name: contactid
contactid.comment: Foreign key to Contact. Contact who created the case.

accountid.name: accountid
accountid.comment: Foreign key to Account. Company that raised this case.

type.name: type
type.comment: Case type (e.g., Question, Problem, Feature Request).

status.name: status
status.comment: Case status (New, In Progress, Escalated, Closed, On Hold).

ownerid.name: ownerid
ownerid.comment: Foreign key to User. Support agent assigned to this case.

createddate.name: createddate
createddate.comment: Timestamp when case was created in Salesforce.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_salesforce__case_history_2
metadata.comment: Staging layer for Salesforce Case History records (case field change audit log). Grain: 1 row per (caseid, lastmodifieddate) combination.

case_history_id.name: case_history_id
case_history_id.comment: Unique identifier for this history record.

lastmodifieddate.name: lastmodifieddate
lastmodifieddate.comment: Last modification date (part of composite grain).

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_salesforce__contact
metadata.comment: Staging layer for Salesforce Contact records (people). Grain: 1 row per contact.

contact_id.name: contact_id
contact_id.comment: Primary key. Unique identifier for the contact from Salesforce.

accountid.name: accountid
accountid.comment: Foreign key to Account. Company this contact works for.

leadsource.name: leadsource
leadsource.comment: How this contact was sourced (e.g., Web, Event, Referral).

ownerid.name: ownerid
ownerid.comment: Foreign key to User. Contact owner.

createddate.name: createddate
createddate.comment: Timestamp when contact was created in Salesforce.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_salesforce__lead
metadata.comment: Staging layer for Salesforce Lead records (pre-conversion prospects). Grain: 1 row per lead.

lead_id.name: lead_id
lead_id.comment: Primary key. Unique identifier for the lead from Salesforce.

leadsource.name: leadsource
leadsource.comment: Lead source (e.g., Web, Event, Referral, Employee Referral).

status.name: status
status.comment: Lead status (Open, Contacted, Qualified, Unqualified, Nurturing, Converted).

ownerid.name: ownerid
ownerid.comment: Foreign key to User. Lead owner/sales rep.

isconverted.name: isconverted
isconverted.comment: Whether lead has been converted to Contact/Account.

convertedaccountid.name: convertedaccountid
convertedaccountid.comment: Foreign key to Account. Account created from conversion (nullable).

convertedcontactid.name: convertedcontactid
convertedcontactid.comment: Foreign key to Contact. Contact created from conversion (nullable).

convertedopportunityid.name: convertedopportunityid
convertedopportunityid.comment: Foreign key to Opportunity. Opportunity created from conversion (nullable).

createddate.name: createddate
createddate.comment: Timestamp when lead was created in Salesforce.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_salesforce__opportunity
metadata.comment: Staging layer for Salesforce Opportunity records. Grain: 1 row per opportunity.

opportunity_id.name: opportunity_id
opportunity_id.comment: Primary key. Unique identifier for the opportunity from Salesforce.

accountid.name: accountid
accountid.comment: Foreign key to Account. Links opportunity to the associated company.

stagename.name: stagename
stagename.comment: Current pipeline stage (e.g., Prospecting, Qualification, Closed Won, Closed Lost).

iswon.name: iswon
iswon.comment: Whether opportunity was won (True = won, False = lost or open).

campaignid.name: campaignid
campaignid.comment: Foreign key to Campaign. Marketing campaign associated with this opportunity (optional).

ownerid.name: ownerid
ownerid.comment: Foreign key to User. Sales rep who owns this opportunity.

createddate.name: createddate
createddate.comment: Timestamp when opportunity was created in Salesforce.

contactid.name: contactid
contactid.comment: Foreign key to Contact. Primary contact for this opportunity (optional).

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_salesforce__opportunity_history
metadata.comment: Staging layer for Salesforce Opportunity History records (stage change audit log). Grain: 1 row per (opportunityid, createddate) combination.

opportunity_history_id.name: opportunity_history_id
opportunity_history_id.comment: Unique identifier for this history record.

createddate.name: createddate
createddate.comment: Timestamp when this stage change occurred (part of composite grain).

stagename.name: stagename
stagename.comment: The stage name at the time of this change.

amount.name: amount
amount.comment: The amount at the time of this stage change.

expectedrevenue.name: expectedrevenue
expectedrevenue.comment: Expected revenue at the time of this change.

probability.name: probability
probability.comment: The probability at the time of this stage change.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_salesforce__pricebook_entry
metadata.comment: Staging layer for Salesforce Pricebook Entry records (product + pricing). Grain: 1 row per product-pricebook combination.

pricebook_entry_id.name: pricebook_entry_id
pricebook_entry_id.comment: Primary key. Unique identifier for the pricebook entry.

pricebook2id.name: pricebook2id
pricebook2id.comment: Foreign key to Pricebook. Which pricebook this entry belongs to.

product2id.name: product2id
product2id.comment: Foreign key to Product. The product in this entry.

unitprice.name: unitprice
unitprice.comment: Unit price for this product in USD.

has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.comment: Staging layer for Salesforce Product records. Grain: 1 row per product.

product_id.name: product_id
product_id.comment: Primary key. Unique identifier for the product from Salesforce.

isactive.name: isactive
isactive.comment: Whether product is active for sale.

has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table
